description: Procurement-agent's approved vendor wants to add a new subcontractor mid-contract to handle overflow capacity for a $200k order. Compliance-agent requires any subcontractor touching customer data to pass the same risk-tier review as the primary vendor, which normally takes 6 weeks, but the order ships in 10 days. Negotiate a path both agents can agree to (e.g. scoped data access, interim monitoring, phased subcontractor approval) within the round budget.
